story.text:
# 🏛️ the Chart Shop
**workshop** · mage · narrative

Navigation District · the City's second named workshop district (population-of-one at v1.6.0). Pleione 🧭 (Greek Πληιόνη · the Sailing One · mother of the Pleiades) holds pre-episodic constellations in suspension under the Φ-gap-at-epistemic-register. Ceremony: Hold · Compare · Map. The bearer releases to the Bonfire (consensus), the Weavers (cloak), or back to the open sea (further wandering · first-class). The attentional register · fourth structural workshop class candidate · C63 ~50%.

## Edges out

- *inhabits* → [[V44 — Chart Shop · Navigation District (Pleione)]]
- *releases_to* → [[the Dragon Bonfire]]
- *releases_to* → [[the Weavers]]
- *founded_in* → [[Tome V Act 17: The Chart Shop Opens · Pleione's First Hold]]

## Edges in

- [[Pleione 🧭]] *keeps* →
- [[Tome V Act 17: The Chart Shop Opens · Pleione's First Hold]] *founds* →
